name: lazycortex
description: AI tooling plugins for Claude Code — skills, agents, and hooks

plugins.name: lazycortex-core
plugins.description: Core skills and agents for Claude Code

plugins.name: lazycortex-diagram
plugins.description: Format-agnostic diagram engine: planner skill + per-format writer agents (mermaid, ascii, more later). Picks kind and format from request context, ships exemplar templates plus an authoring contract, and bundles a fixture-based regression suite.

plugins.name: lazycortex-log
plugins.description: Logging, changelog, and change-history recall for Claude Code

plugins.name: lazycortex-obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault bootstrap and configuration management for Claude Code

plugins.name: lazycortex-specs
plugins.description: Specification and design skills for Claude Code
